activeModelSpecNote: Active modelSpec inputs use the Slice 2 fixed-workbook runtime defaults. Slice 3 dashboard formula outputs and Slice 4 pro forma reserve-state outputs are active assertions. Formula Audit remains captured as legacy diagnostic provenance only and is not an app input/output assertion.

extractionAuthority.note: The artifact-tool workbook import still fails on person/comment metadata; raw package extraction is the Slice 1 authority and does not mutate workbook bytes.

workbookContract.activeModelSpecNote: Active modelSpec inputs use the Slice 2 fixed-workbook runtime defaults. Slice 3 dashboard formula outputs and Slice 4 pro forma reserve-state outputs are active assertions. Formula Audit remains captured as legacy diagnostic provenance only and is not an app input/output assertion.

defaultInputSources.componentOverrides: No active overrides in fixed-workbook default state

E.value: Roof squares scale by bedroom/property size; 3BR keeps current 25 square default.
Scaled from 50-60 LF attached/1BR and 120-130 LF 3BR foundation baseline.
Unchanged; inspection override handles actual scope.
Scaled from single-car pad to two-car driveway.
Usable floor area baseline by bedroom count.
Uses same current floor-area proxy as flooring.

D.value: Severe UV variation, ice dams, freeze-thaw expansion
Acidic precipitation, heavy snow loading (Eastern band)
High summer humidity, corrosive road salt aerosolization
Extended heating seasons, thermal cycling stress
Hard municipal water scaling, systemic basement dampness
Expansive clay soils, extreme hydrostatic pressure
80-100 freeze-thaw cycles per winter, heavy road salt
Track warping from temperature swings, torsion spring fatigue from cold
Standard mechanical wear and tenant use
Hard water scaling on internal pumps, tenant load fatigue
Winter boot salt tracking, thermal expansion/contraction
Seal failure from freeze-thaw cycles, UV warp
Wind-driven rain, hail micro-fractures, UV fade

B.formula: VALUE(VLOOKUP(B3, 'Rent & Vacancy Baselines'!A:F, MATCH(B4, 'Rent & Vacancy Baselines'!A1:F1, 0), FALSE))

dashboardHeader.formula: IF(COUNTIF(INDIRECT("'Sinking Fund Engine'!L2:L19"),"OVERRIDE ACTIVE")>0,"INSPECTION OVERRIDES ACTIVE","")

localUnitCost.formula: VLOOKUP(A2, 'CapEx Cost Matrix'!$A$2:$F$19, 2, FALSE) * IF(Dashboard!$B$3="Central (Greensburg 15601)", 1, (1 + VLOOKUP(A2, 'CapEx Cost Matrix'!$A$2:$F$19, MATCH(Dashboard!$B$3, 'CapEx Cost Matrix'!$A$1:$F$1, 0), FALSE)))

formulaAudit.sourceNote: Formula Audit is legacy workbook diagnostic evidence only. It is outdated for this iteration and is not canonical app input or output behavior.
formulaAudit.year10RoiConflict: Year10_ROI points to B28, while Year10_Liquidation_Wealth points to L17 and includes accumulated reserve cash.

C2.formula: IF(B2=0,"OK - no overrides",B2&" override row(s) active")
